subcodes.first_line: The Best-Beloved is come, and the tongue of existence speaketh and sayeth: "Praise be unto Thee, O God of all who dwell in the heavens." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی المقصود و لسان الوجود ینطق و یقول لک الحمد یا اله من فی السموات و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
